description: Raw OOXML access via the `raw` (read) and `raw-set` (write) commands. Use only when L2 DOM operations cannot express what you need. Two part-path forms are accepted: (1) semantic short names (recommended — stable across sheet rename/reorder) and (2) zip-internal URIs (any path ending in .xml is resolved literally against the package, e.g. /xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml).

parts.name: /workbook
parts.desc: Workbook part (sheet refs, defined names, calc properties)

parts.name: /<SheetName>/drawing
parts.desc: Drawing part for that sheet (shapes, charts, pictures)

parts.name: /<SheetName>/chart[N]
parts.desc: Nth chart on the named sheet

parts.name: /<SheetName>/<rId>
parts.desc: Sheet-relationship part by relId (covers OLE embeds, images, etc.)

parts.name: /<zip-uri>.xml
parts.desc: Any path ending in .xml is resolved as a literal zip-internal URI (e.g. /xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml, /xl/styles.xml, /xl/sharedStrings.xml, /xl/theme/theme1.xml). Use when you need positional-by-zip-order access; semantic names are preferred for stability.
